'''Dalos IV''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|hot]], [[Water/Legends|humid]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of shallow [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Nilgaard sector/Legends|Nilgaard sector]]. It had a single [[Forest/Legends|rainforest]] continent, [[Kavila]], and the planet was 7,000 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] in diameter. It was originally a [[Prison/Legends|penal]] colony. Due to the planet being largely ignored by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it became home to many beings fleeing persecution. The local architecture was old-fashioned, but the technology was of modern levels. [[Voyager's Rest]] was located on Kavila. A popular local sport was [[Trophy Chase]], in which the locals rode [[neph]]s. The planet's [[Governor/Legends|Governor]]-General was [[Lira Rimrunner]].
